test_traj.command:
cat <<'EOF' > test_alive_and.ll
; Test for alive-tv verification of AND transformation
define i1 @original(float %x) {
  %cmp1 = fcmp olt float %x, 5.0
  %cmp2 = fcmp ogt float %x, -5.0
  %and = and i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  ret i1 %and
}

define i1 @transformed(float %x) {
  %fabs = call float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %x)
  %cmp = fcmp olt float %fabs, 5.0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

declare float @llvm.fabs.f32(float)
EOF
